---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

A clear and concise description of the problem this feature solves, or the motivation behind it.
Example: "I find it frustrating that I have to manually X every time Y happens."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, related issues, or other context.
